summary: Safety Playground Testing Complete - All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with preset buttons, analysis results, detection layers, rewrite output, timing, and save test case features all working correctly.

issues: WebSocket connection for live updates fails with 403 error - this is a minor issue that doesn't affect core functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Safety Playground fully tested. The admin-only tool at /app/admin → Safety Lab tab is working correctly. Uses REAL production pipeline (no mocks). All 3 detection layers (rule_rewriter, semantic_detector, policy_engine) working. Preset buttons fill input correctly. Analysis returns decision, timing, layers, rewrite_output, and explanation. Save test case feature works. Saved cases list displays correctly.
